Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a detailed description of the loan approval process according to the DECLARE model constraints. Use the model: need to trace flow: start with Receive_Application (init and responded_existence). Then from response: Receive_Application -> Preliminary_Credit_Check (response edge).

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From existence: Receive_Application and Gather_Additional_Documents (both required). So after receiving application, need to gather additional docs? Possibly concurrently? Then Preliminary_Credit_Check precedes Gather_Additional_Documents? Actually chain: Preliminary_Credit_Check -> target Gather_Additional_Documents in succession.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The exactly_one constraint on Preliminary_Credit_Check means it occurs exactly once.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: coexistence edge Gather_Additional_Documents -> target Authorize_Contract_Terms meaning Gather_Additional_Documents and Authorize_Contract_Terms can coexist? Actually coexistence means both can occur (not necessarily ordered) but maybe they can happen in any order relative? chainprecedence: Authorize_Contract_Terms target Preliminary_Credit_Check (so Authorize_Contract_Terms must happen after Preliminary_Credit_Check).

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: noncoexistence Transfer_Funds -> target Receive_Application meaning Transfer_Funds and Receive_Application cannot coexist (i.e., Transfer_Funds cannot happen while Receive_Application is happening? Means Transfer_Funds must not overlap? Likely means Transfer_Funds cannot occur before Receive_Application completed). nonsuccession Notify_Customer -> target Preliminary_Credit_Check meaning Notify_Customer cannot succeed Preliminary_Credit_Check? Actually nonsuccession means Notify_Customer cannot be a successor of Preliminary_Credit_Check i.e., Notify_Customer cannot occur after Preliminary_Credit_Check? Or Notify_Customer cannot follow directly? nonchainsuccession Authorize_Contract_Terms -> target Notify_Customer meaning Authorize_Contract_Terms cannot be a chain-successor of Notify_Customer (i.e., Authorize_Contract_Terms cannot occur after Notify_Customer).

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: precedence edge Quality_Assurance_Review -> target Authorize_Contract_Terms meaning QA review before authorize. Also chainsuccession Quality_Assurance_Review -> target Assemble_Loan_Offer_Package.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: chainresponse Assemble_Loan_Offer_Package -> target Transfer_Funds. altresponse Transfer_Funds -> target Notify_Customer. altprecedence Notify_Customer -> target Transfer_Funds meaning notify before transfer?

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: overall logical flow: Receive Application -> Preliminary Credit Check -> Gather Additional Documents -> Assemble Loan Offer Package -> Quality Assurance Review -> Authorize Contract Terms -> Transfer Funds -> Notify Customer. Also some constraints ensure certain activities cannot happen out of order (e.g., no Transfer Funds before Receive Application, no Notify before Credit Check, etc.)
